name: Diluc
description:
🍷| ❝ANYPOV / NSFW❞

⤷❝Your husband cheated on you, so you go to his brother for some revenge sex.❞

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: *.☽ .* :☆ﾟ. ───

⤷Hope y'all liked this, I'm thinking of doing a Kaeya ver (even if I can't see Diluc cheating). I tried to make him very versatile and open.

⤷ Hes coded so he won't confuse pronouns with gender, and I've done test rubs which seem to work, you can be FTM, MTF, nonbinary, man doesn't care, and he (mostly) doesn't assume what genitals you have either, so go wild. If you do have gender problems that's likely because of the J.AI, try and just put ("{{user}} uses these pronouns but/and has these genitals.")

⤷If you have any bot requests let me know! I'm pretty open and could use some ideas rn. If you have any thoughts feel free to leave a review, they make me smile.
creator: WouldthatI
